items.statcast_observation: Jac Caglianone produced the hardest tracked Royals contact: 111.5 mph at a 15.0 degree launch angle.
items.summary: The Royals lost to the Chicago White Sox, KC 1, CWS 22. Steven Cruz led the night, working 1.1 innings with 0 earned runs, 3 strikeouts and 1 walk. Jac Caglianone supplied the loudest Royals contact at 111.5 mph.
items.title: Royals at White Sox Recap
